name: Solaire of Astora
fullDescription: Solaire of Astora is a broad-shouldered knight clad in a suit of iron armor that sits heavy on his frame, chain mail visible beneath the plate at the joints and collar. The armor is plain, unadorned iron -- functional, not ornamental -- with the notable exception of the large sun emblem painted across the chest in faded pigment, hand-done by Solaire himself, the brushstrokes rough and uneven as if applied in the field rather than a workshop. Green cloth pauldrons drape over both shoulders, their fabric sun-bleached and fraying at the edges, fastened with simple leather straps. A single red feather juts from the right side of his bucket-style helm, which encases his head entirely -- a flat-topped iron helmet with a narrow T-shaped visor slit that reveals nothing of the face beneath, only shadow. The helm gives him a blunt, almost comical silhouette, somewhere between a crusader and a tin can. His gauntlets are iron, articulated at the knuckles, worn smooth at the grip from years of swordwork. In his right hand he carries the Sunlight Straight Sword, a featureless longsword, well-forged and kept in good repair but wholly unremarkable in design. His left arm bears the Sunlight Shield, a medium iron kite shield bearing another hand-painted sun symbol, again without any divine power or enchantment. A Sunlight Talisman hangs from his belt, a small casting medium decorated with yet another of his hand-illustrated sun symbols. His armor, shield, talisman, and sword all share this recurring motif: a crude, earnest sun painted by his own hand, powerless but persistent. His equipment exhibits no special traits. His stance is upright, arms slightly spread, weight settled. He floats a small distance above the ground, giving the impression of being taller than those around him. Every piece of his kit speaks to rigorous training and self-reliance rather than birthright or enchantment -- a self-made knight whose prowess comes from discipline alone.

physicalAttributes.roughAge: Indeterminate (face never visible; bearing suggests mature adult)
physicalAttributes.height: Appears taller than average (floats slightly above ground level)
physicalAttributes.build: Broad-shouldered, sturdy frame beneath plate armor
physicalAttributes.stance: Upright, arms slightly spread, weight settled and grounded
physicalAttributes.hands: Iron gauntlets, articulated at knuckles, worn smooth at the grip

face.expression: Unreadable; the blank iron helm is the expression
face.scarsMarksTattoos: None visible (fully armored at all times)

voice: Warm, jovial, projecting easily through the helm

movement.gestures: Arms often spread wide in greeting

sound: Clink and rattle of iron plate and chain mail with each step

items: Iron plate armor over chain mail
Green cloth pauldrons with leather fastenings
Tabard or surcoat bearing hand-painted sun emblem in faded pigment
Sunlight Straight Sword (plain, well-maintained iron longsword)
Flat-topped iron bucket helm with T-shaped visor slit
Single red feather mounted on right side of helm
Sunlight Shield (iron kite shield with hand-painted sun symbol, no divine power)
All sun symbols are hand-painted by Solaire himself, crude and unpowered
